dimensions.name: On Task
dimensions.question: Are all students engaged in the work of the lesson from start to finish?

dimensions.name: Community of Learners
dimensions.question: Are all students active members of a joyful and supportive classroom community?

dimensions.name: Essential Content
dimensions.question: Are all current students working with content aligned to the appropriate standards for their subject and grade?

dimensions.name: Cognitive Engagement
dimensions.question: Are all current students responsible for doing the thinking in this classroom?

dimensions.name: Demonstration of Learning
dimensions.question: Do all current students demonstrate that they are learning?

feedback_fields.label: See It / Name It: Success
feedback_fields.placeholder: What's working well in this classroom?

feedback_fields.label: See It / Name It: Area(s) of Growth
feedback_fields.placeholder: Where is there opportunity to grow?

feedback_fields.label: Do It: What did you practice?
feedback_fields.placeholder: What was practiced during the observation debrief?

context_fields.label: Observation Purpose
context_fields.placeholder: Indicate the focus area or purpose for this observation

context_fields.label: ActMo
context_fields.description: 85% of students in classrooms observed receive feedback so that they are on track to achieve learning goals
